title: lathyrus stipulaceus var. incanus
intro: Lathyrus stipulaceus var. incanus, also known as the silky pea or silky sweet pea, is a variety of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in the relief of various health issues. The health benefits of Lathyrus stipulaceus var. incanus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antispasmodic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its usage and efficacy should be further studied and verified.
